title: Squirrel Removal in Hempstead, Long Island | $900-$2,500

intro: Squirrels invading your Hempstead home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Hempstead and Long Island, protecting your property from damage and health risks. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in residential and commercial properties.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Hempstead and the surrounding Long Island communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven squirrel removal techniques. Our licensed professionals respond quickly, offer guaranteed results, and provide thorough exclusion services to keep your Hempstead property squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Hempstead's mix of historic homes, modern developments, and tree-lined neighborhoods near locations like Hempstead Lake State Park creates ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The village's older homes and commercial buildings around Main Street and Fulton Avenue are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through attics, soffits, and roof vents.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Hempstead typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Hempstead attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible droppings in the attic, chewed wires or wood, damaged insulation, and squirrels entering or exiting through roof vents or soffits. You may also notice increased squirrel activity on your roof or around your home's exterior.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods comply with all New York State and local Hempstead regulations. We use humane live trapping techniques and follow proper relocation protocols. Our exclusion methods prevent re-entry without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Hempstead property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Hempstead service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, but we begin trapping immediately. Complete exclusion and repairs are finished within 1-2 weeks for most properties.
